module.name: timeline
module.description: Displays multiple content blocks as a vertical timeline of numbered (or custom-labelled) steps.
module.aiSpec:
Use to present a sequence of steps / phases / milestones as a vertical timeline with numbered (or custom-labelled) markers. Block module: split the body into steps with `<!-- @ -->` — one section per step, in order. Each section is ordinary Markdown (a heading + description works well). Do NOT use this for a flat bullet list; use it when the order and progression matter.
Parameters: color — marker/line accent colour (default var(--accent-color)). active_index — which step is highlighted, 1-based (default 0 = none). indexes — custom marker labels as a list, e.g. [Phase 1, Phase 2, Phase 3] (default [] = auto 1,2,3...). markershape — marker outline: pill (default) | rounded | square. cardbg — background colour of each step card (default "#ffffff"). gap — vertical spacing between steps as a CSS length (default "2rem"). connector — draw the vertical line linking the markers (default true).
Example: <!-- @timeline active_index: 2, color: #2563eb, indexes: [Plan, Build, Ship], gap: 2.5rem --> ### Plan Interview users and scope the work. <!-- @ --> ### Build Agile development with continuous review. <!-- @ --> ### Ship Integration testing and release. <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Color
param.desc: Accent colour of the markers and connecting line.

param.name: indexes
param.label: Custom Labels
param.desc: Marker labels, e.g. [Phase 1, Phase 2, Phase 3]. Blank = automatic numbering.

param.name: markershape
param.label: Marker Shape
param.desc: Outline shape of the step markers.

param.name: cardbg
param.label: Card Background
param.desc: Background colour of each step's content card.

param.name: gap
param.label: Step Gap
param.desc: Vertical spacing between steps as a CSS length, e.g. 2rem or 24px.

param.name: connector
param.label: Connector Line
param.desc: Show the vertical line joining the markers.

snippet.label: Timeline
snippet.text: <!-- @timeline active_index: 2, indexes: [Phase1, Phase2, Phase3] --> ### Phase 1: Requirements & Research Identify issues through user interviews. <!-- @ --> ### Phase 2: System Design & Prototyping Create screen mockups and gather feedback. <!-- @ --> ### Phase 3: Development & QA Proceed with agile development and conduct integration testing. <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Converts multiple sections into a vertical step display with sequential numbers (or custom labels). Markdown is supported inside.
